iterations.theme: The Spiritual Dimension of Moderation and Renunciation in a Materialistic World
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast transcript is 21 minutes long, which is shorter than the requested minimum iteration length of 35-45 minutes. Therefore, the entire content is presented as a single iteration.
